headline: This New Dividend Fund Is Chasing Yield And Growth At The Same Time
summary: Most dividend ETFs make you pick a lane. You can chase yield with funds packed full of utilities, telecoms, and tobacco names that throw off cash but barely grow, or you can buy dividend growth funds that pay you almost nothing today on the promise of bigger checks a decade out. JPMorgan Dividend Leaders ETF ... This New Dividend Fund Is Chasing Yield And Growth At The Same Time

headline: Umicore - Transparency notifications by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc.
summary: Transparency notifications byJP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. that it has successively crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards and then upwards again on 27 April 2026.
